title: dactylorchis romana
intro: Dactylorchis romana, also known as Lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Dactylorhiza. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dactylorchis romana include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
